CONFIDENTIALITY UNDERTAKING (MALAYSIA)

This undertaking is given by Mr Ahmad Rahman (MyKad 880415-10-5432) in favour of
Skyline Industries Sdn. Bhd. in connection with Project Hibiscus.

The Recipient acknowledges receipt of confidential information including the proposed
acquisition of Tunas Berhad for RM 450 million before public announcement.

Contact: ahmad.rahman@skyline.my, +60 12-345 6789.
